title: Ram Chalisa
intro: Read the complete Shri Ram Chalisa to seek the divine blessings and righteous guidance of Lord Rama.
description:
॥ Doha ॥
Shri Guru Charan Saroj Raj, Nij Man Mukur Sudhar.
Barnau Raghubar Bimal Jasu, Jo Dayaku Phal Chari.
Buddhiheen Tanu Jaanike, Sumirau Pavan-Kumar.
Bal Buddhi Vidya Dehu Mohi, Harahu Kalesa Vikar.

॥ Chaupai ॥
Jay Jay Jay Raghuvansh Vishala.
Jay Jay Jay Purushottam Lala.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Lalate.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Sate.
Jay Jay Jay Karuna Ke Sagar.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dosh Ujagar.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Khivaiya.
Bhav Sagar Se Paar Lagaiya.
Jay Raghuvanshi Jay Jagvandan.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Murti Nandan.
Jay Jay Jay Tribhuvan Ke Swami.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Antaryami.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dashrath Nandan.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Kaushalya Nandan.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Lakshman Bhrata.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sita Ke Trata.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bharat Ke Swami.
Jay Jay Jay Shatrughna Ke Anugami.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Van Ke Vasi.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dusht Vinashak.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Setu Nirmata.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Lanka Vidhata.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Vibhishan Rakshak.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Rakshak.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ayodhya Ke Raja.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Tajate Akulaja.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Saryu Teere.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Vidhi Dheer.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Satya Ke Dhari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dharma Vichari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Prem Ke Data.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Gyan Ke Gyata.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Kripa Nidhana.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sakal Sujana.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Paap Vinashak.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dukh Bhanjan.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Mangal Kari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Amangal Hari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Ke Pyare.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Jag Se Nyare.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Ananta.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Gun Santa.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Naam Bhajaiya.
Bhav Sagar Se Paar Lagaiya.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Keerti Gaai.
Jo Gavai So Phal Pavai Bhai.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ka Dhyan Lagavai.
Jo Dhyavai So Moksh Pavai.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Leela Nyari.
Jo Gavai So Hoy Sukhakari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ka Naam Mahan.
Jo Bhajai So Hoy Kalyan.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Mahima Bhari.
Jo Gavai So Hoy Dukh Hari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Nivasa.
Jo Bhajai So Mitai Sab Aasa.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Sukh Data.
Jo Bhajai So Hoy Sukh Gyata.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Lalate.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Sate.
Jay Jay Jay Raghuvansh Vishala.
Jay Jay Jay Purushottam Lala.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Lalate.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Gun Sate.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ati Sukhdai.
Jo Gavai So Param Pad Paai.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Bhajaiya.
Ram Kaho Prabhu Paar Lagaiya.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Ki Jay.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Kaam Ki Jay.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Naam Ki Mahima.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Mahima.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Jay Ho Bhai.
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai Sukhdai.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Jay Ho Bhari.
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai Dukh Hari.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Jay Ho Sada.
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai Sabai Kada.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Ki Jay.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sita Ki Jay.

॥ Doha ॥
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai, Sada Mile Sukh-Chain.
Tulsi Mastak Tab Navavai, Jab Tak Ram Naam Ke Nain.
Ram-Ram Sab Koi Kahat, Kahat Na Kahiyo Koy.
Jo Kahai Ram Rasal Hai, To Bhav Sagar Paar Hoy.
meaning:
Shri Ram Chalisa (With English Meaning)

॥ Doha ॥
Shri Guru Charan Saroj Raj, Nij Man Mukur Sudhar.
Cleansing the mirror of my mind with the dust of the Guru's lotus feet.
Barnau Raghubar Bimal Jasu, Jo Dayaku Phal Chari.
I describe the pure glory of Lord Rama, who grants the four fruits of life.
Buddhiheen Tanu Jaanike, Sumirau Pavan-Kumar.
Knowing my body is devoid of wisdom, I remember the son of the wind, Hanuman.
Bal Buddhi Vidya Dehu Mohi, Harahu Kalesa Vikar.
Grant me strength, wisdom, and knowledge, and remove all my sufferings.

॥ Chaupai ॥
Jay Jay Jay Raghuvansh Vishala.
Victory to the glorious Raghuvansh lineage.
Jay Jay Jay Purushottam Lala.
Victory to Lord Rama, the best among men.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Lalate.
Victory to Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Sate.
Victory to the one who is always with his devotees.
Jay Jay Jay Karuna Ke Sagar.
Victory to the ocean of compassion.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dosh Ujagar.
Victory to the Lord who removes faults.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Khivaiya.
Victory to Lord Rama, the helmsman of life.
Bhav Sagar Se Paar Lagaiya.
He is the one who helps us cross the ocean of existence.
Jay Raghuvanshi Jay Jagvandan.
Victory to the Raghuvanshi and the one worshiped by the world.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Murti Nandan.
Victory to the Lord of beautiful form.
Jay Jay Jay Tribhuvan Ke Swami.
Victory to the Lord of the three worlds.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Antaryami.
Victory to the Lord who knows the inner hearts of all.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dashrath Nandan.
Victory to the son of King Dashrath.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Kaushalya Nandan.
Victory to the son of Mother Kaushalya.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Lakshman Bhrata.
Victory to the brother of Lakshman.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sita Ke Trata.
Victory to the protector of Mother Sita.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bharat Ke Swami.
Victory to the Lord of Bharat.
Jay Jay Jay Shatrughna Ke Anugami.
Victory to the one who is followed by Shatrughna.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Van Ke Vasi.
Victory to the Lord who resided in the forest.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dusht Vinashak.
Victory to the destroyer of the wicked.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Setu Nirmata.
Victory to the creator of the bridge (Ram Setu).
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Lanka Vidhata.
Victory to the Lord who conquered Lanka.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Vibhishan Rakshak.
Victory to the protector of Vibhishan.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Rakshak.
Victory to the protector of all devotees.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ayodhya Ke Raja.
Victory to the King of Ayodhya.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Tajate Akulaja.
Victory to the one who removes all anxieties.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Saryu Teere.
Victory to the Lord residing on the banks of Saryu.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Vidhi Dheer.
Victory to the Lord who is patient in all ways.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Satya Ke Dhari.
Victory to the one who upholds the truth.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dharma Vichari.
Victory to the one who contemplates righteousness.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Prem Ke Data.
Victory to the giver of love.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Gyan Ke Gyata.
Victory to the knower of all knowledge.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Kripa Nidhana.
Victory to the treasure of grace.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sakal Sujana.
Victory to the all-knowing Lord.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Paap Vinashak.
Victory to the destroyer of sins.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Dukh Bhanjan.
Victory to the remover of sorrows.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Mangal Kari.
Victory to the one who brings auspiciousness.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Amangal Hari.
Victory to the one who removes inauspiciousness.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Ke Pyare.
Victory to the beloved of his devotees.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Jag Se Nyare.
Victory to the Lord who is unique in the world.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Ananta.
Victory to the eternal Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Gun Santa.
Victory to the Lord of all virtues.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Naam Bhajaiya.
Victory to the one whose name is chanted.
Bhav Sagar Se Paar Lagaiya.
He helps cross the ocean of life.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Keerti Gaai.
Victory to the Lord whose glory is sung.
Jo Gavai So Phal Pavai Bhai.
Those who sing it attain the fruits they desire.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ka Dhyan Lagavai.
Victory to the Lord on whom one meditates.
Jo Dhyavai So Moksh Pavai.
Those who meditate on him attain liberation.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Leela Nyari.
Victory to the Lord of miraculous divine plays.
Jo Gavai So Hoy Sukhakari.
Those who sing it attain happiness.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ka Naam Mahan.
Victory to the great name of the Lord.
Jo Bhajai So Hoy Kalyan.
Those who chant it attain welfare.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Mahima Bhari.
Victory to the immense glory of the Lord.
Jo Gavai So Hoy Dukh Hari.
Those who sing it have their sorrows removed.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Nivasa.
Victory to the Lord who dwells in the heart.
Jo Bhajai So Mitai Sab Aasa.
Those who chant it are freed from worldly desires.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Sukh Data.
Victory to the giver of all happiness.
Jo Bhajai So Hoy Sukh Gyata.
Those who chant it experience true happiness.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Lalate.
Victory to Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Bhaktan Sate.
Victory to the one who stands with his devotees.
Jay Jay Jay Raghuvansh Vishala.
Victory to the vast Raghuvansh lineage.
Jay Jay Jay Purushottam Lala.
Victory to the ideal man, Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Lalate.
Victory to Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sab Gun Sate.
Victory to the one endowed with all virtues.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ati Sukhdai.
Victory to the Lord who gives great happiness.
Jo Gavai So Param Pad Paai.
Those who sing it attain the highest state.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Bhajaiya.
Victory to the chanter of Lord Rama's name.
Ram Kaho Prabhu Paar Lagaiya.
Say Ram, and the Lord will help you cross the ocean of life.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Ki Jay.
Victory to Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Kaam Ki Jay.
Victory to the works of the Lord.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Naam Ki Mahima.
Victory to the glory of the Lord's name.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Mahima.
Victory to the glory of Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Jay Ho Bhai.
Victory to the Lord forever.
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai Sukhdai.
Chanting the name of Ram brings happiness.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Jay Ho Bhari.
Victory to the great Lord.
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai Dukh Hari.
Chanting the name of Ram removes sorrows.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ki Jay Ho Sada.
Victory to the Lord forever.
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai Sabai Kada.
Chanting the name of Ram is always beneficial.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Ram Ki Jay.
Victory to Lord Rama.
Jay Jay Jay Prabhu Sita Ki Jay.
Victory to Mother Sita.

॥ Doha ॥
Ram Naam Jo Bhajai, Sada Mile Sukh-Chain.
Those who chant the name of Ram always find peace and comfort.
Tulsi Mastak Tab Navavai, Jab Tak Ram Naam Ke Nain.
Tulsi says my head bows only when I see the eyes of Lord Ram.
Ram-Ram Sab Koi Kahat, Kahat Na Kahiyo Koy.
Everyone says Ram-Ram, but not everyone says it with true devotion.
Jo Kahai Ram Rasal Hai, To Bhav Sagar Paar Hoy.
One who says it with love finds it sweet and crosses the ocean of life.

faq.a1: It is a powerful 40-verse devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Rama, seeking his divine blessings and guidance.
faq.q2: What are the main benefits of reciting it?
faq.a2: Recitation brings mental peace, helps overcome life's obstacles, and fills the devotee's mind with deep devotion and positivity.
faq.q3: What is the best time to recite Ram Chalisa?
faq.a3: Brahmamuhurta (early morning) is considered ideal. Additionally, Tuesdays and Saturdays are highly auspicious for the recitation.
faq.q4: Does it help in removing negative energy?
faq.a4: Yes, reciting with sincere devotion creates a positive aura and helps dispel negativity from the mind and surroundings.
faq.a5: It is traditionally inspired by the devotional traditions of Goswami Tulsidas, the author of the Ramcharitmanas.
faq.q6: Who can recite the Ram Chalisa?
faq.a6: Anyone with a pure heart and unwavering faith in Lord Rama can recite it, regardless of their background.
faq.q7: How many times should one recite it?
faq.a7: You can recite it 1, 3, 5, or 11 times depending on your time and level of devotion.
faq.a8: Fasting is not mandatory, but maintaining a satvik (pure) lifestyle and fasting on Tuesdays or Saturdays can enhance focus and dedication.
faq.q9: What is the spiritual significance of the Ram Chalisa?
faq.a9: It serves as a pathway to imbibe the virtues of 'Maryada Purushottam' Lord Rama and to surrender oneself to his divine will.
faq.q10: Is listening to it as beneficial as reciting it?
faq.a10: Yes, if you are unable to recite it yourself, listening to the Chalisa with full attention and devotion is considered equally beneficial.,
